title: phyllanthus lativenius
intro: Phyllanthus lativenius is a type of plant species within the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the West African leaf artemisia or West African ironweed. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus lativenius include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
